item.title: Discordant Clostridioides difficile testing as a predictor of inflammatory bowel disease therapy escalation.
item.description: Inflammatory bowel diseases - In patients with inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), Clostridioides difficile infection (CDI) presents with clinical features indistinguishable from the underlying disease. Sequential polymerase chai...

item.title: The role of enteral nutrition and parenteral nutrition in the management of inflammatory bowel disease: a bibliometric analysis (1999-2025).
item.description: Frontiers in nutrition - Systematic review - As a chronic disease often accompanied by malnutrition, Inflammatory Bowel Disease (IBD) has encountered many difficulties in long-term management. Enteral nutrition (EN) and parenteral nutrition (...
